headline: OpenAI launches ChatGPT advertising platform as AI capability accelerates
body: OpenAI has opened ChatGPT to advertisers, marking a shift toward monetization of conversational AI interfaces. This development arrives as GPT-5 demonstrates clinical problem-solving capabilities, including helping an immunologist resolve a three-year research challenge. For healthcare organizations, this signals that conversational AI is moving from experimental tools to integrated platforms where patient engagement, clinical research support, and health information discovery will increasingly occur. Healthcare vendors should evaluate how their solutions will interact with AI-driven discovery channels and whether they need presence in these platforms to reach clinicians and patients. The vendor landscape is consolidating around conversational interfaces as primary entry points for health information and clinical decision support.
